Profile

I am Nishaanth Kannan, an engineer who found his truest calling at the intersection of strategy, people, and storytelling. From the production floors of Chennai to the consulting rooms of Dublin, every chapter of my life has been defined by one thing: a refusal to stay in one lane.

Currently pursuing my MSc in Management Consultancy at UCD Michael Smurfit Business School, one of Europe's top business schools, while simultaneously driving talent and tech acquisition at Softest Consulting Services Limited in Ireland.

"The creativity demanded on a film set and the precision demanded in a boardroom are not so different after all."

I came to Ireland from Chennai, India, driven by ambition, shaped by discipline, and guided by curiosity. I play chess. I lift. I watch geopolitics unfold like a grand strategy game. And I believe the best version of yourself is always one brave decision away.

Strategic ThinkerActor & Filmmaker People-FirstCross-Cultural MSc Smurfit UCDDublin-Based

Attributes
DISTINCTIVE Strengths
01
01
Analytical Precision
An engineering foundation sharpened my ability to break complex problems into structured, solvable components. This is a natural asset in consulting environments that demand rigorous, data-informed thinking.
02
02
Cross-Domain Versatility
From production floors to boardrooms, from film sets to talent acquisition. I have navigated wildly different arenas, giving me a rare 360 degree perspective on how organisations and people truly function.
03
03
Global Mindset
Having studied and worked across two countries and cultures, I operate with natural cultural fluency, international awareness, and the adaptability that today's global consulting landscape demands.
04
04
Creative Intelligence
Being an actor and filmmaker has sharpened my empathy, storytelling instinct, and the ability to read a room. Qualities that make me a consultant who connects with the people behind the problems.
